shortDescription: Spacious 5-bedroom detached home on a quiet street in Kew Beach with mature trees and a private backyard.
fullDescription: Welcome to 96 Waverley Road in the vibrant Kew Beach neighbourhood. This beautifully presented detached home offers generous living space across multiple levels. The main living area boasts an open-concept design with pot lights and a cosy gas fireplace. The kitchen is a chef’s dream with quartz countertops, a large island, and high-end stainless-steel appliances. The sleeping quarters comprise 5 comfortable bedrooms, the largest enjoying a private ensuite bathroom. Building amenities include a fitness centre, rooftop terrace, party room, and 24-hour concierge. Enjoy a 90+ walk score with parks, cafes, schools, and transit all within minutes.
keyFeatures: Fenced yard ideal for children and pets
Open kitchen with waterfall island and pot lights
